name: Lin Shi
summary: 12+ years of full-stack web development experience, currently focused on AI-powered products
Proficient in React / Next.js / Expo / Laravel / Prisma / PostgreSQL | TEM-8 (Test for English Majors, Band 8)
Embracing AI-assisted development workflows to accelerate solo product delivery
Proven remote collaboration skills with a strong track record of independently delivering full-stack solutions

techStack.title: Tech Stack
items: Backend: Laravel, Nest.js, Prisma, PostgreSQL, Redis
AI & Tooling: AI-assisted development (Copilot, Cursor), prompt engineering

items.title: Full-Stack Developer
description: Building AI-powered products including starai.pro and aniani.ai with the team, and solo-building mysticx.ai — an AI tarot web app (Next.js, Prisma, BullMQ, Redis, PostgreSQL) and mobile app (Expo for iOS and Android).
Leveraging AI-assisted development workflows to accelerate product delivery as a solo full-stack developer.

items.title: Web Frontend Developer
description: Built Web3 applications using React, Next.js, and TypeScript. Led the development of wallet integration and smart contract interaction modules. Managed a small frontend team and delivered multiple product releases.

items.title: Web Full-Stack Developer
description: Collaborated with international clients on various projects. Independently delivered websites, admin panels, and mobile apps using React, Vue, Laravel, and React Native.

items.title: Senior Web Frontend Developer
description: Led development of tourism platforms using React, Vue, Taro, Laravel, and MySQL. Delivered several WeChat Mini Programs, mobile apps, and CMS systems from end to end.

items.company: 蓝石创想（北京）科技有限公司
items.title: Web Frontend Developer
description: Led development across multiple client projects using Angular, Ionic, and Laravel. Responsible for technical architecture, deployment, and maintenance.

items.company: 西安佰登网络科技有限公司
items.title: Web Frontend Engineer
description: Developed and maintained an English learning platform and various overseas client projects. Worked with AngularJS, Cordova, PHP (Zend Framework). Handled full-cycle development and performance optimization.

items.title: Mysticx.ai
items.tech: Next.js + Prisma + BullMQ + Redis + PostgreSQL + Expo
description: Solo-building an AI-powered tarot reading platform with both web and mobile clients. Web app built with Next.js, Prisma, BullMQ, Redis, and PostgreSQL; mobile app built with Expo targeting iOS and Android. Leveraging AI-assisted development to ship as a one-person team.

items.title: StarAI Products (starai.pro & aniani.ai)
description: Collaborating with the development team to build AI-powered products. starai.pro is an AI video creation and trading platform. Responsible for full-stack development across multiple product lines.

items.title: Aspecta AI
description: Led the frontend team to develop the frontend of Aspecta AI Web3 trading app. Built responsive web pages for both desktop and mobile using Next.js. Implemented wallet connections and smart contract interactions.

items.title: Online Slide Builder
description: Independently developed a SaaS platform for creating WebSlides.tv-style presentations. Features included slide templates, company-wide sharing, and remote slide control. Helped users streamline presentation creation and improve B2B engagement.

items.title: Germany Travel & Shopping Guide App
description: Built a mobile app for Chinese travelers in Germany, featuring travel guides, itinerary tracking, and interactive maps. Independently developed and published to both iOS and Android platforms.

items.title: Chile National Tourism Website
description: Developed responsive frontend pages and optimized performance. Set up a custom automated build pipeline. Delivered on schedule with stable support for both mobile and desktop users.

items.title: Genetic Testing Report System
description: **Phase 1:** Participated in requirement analysis and database design; led development of drug dictionary and report generation workflows.

**Phase 2:** Refactored frontend architecture and implemented complex medical report PDF rendering with NG-ZORRO and PrinceXML. Led a small team to successful delivery, enabling the client to generate high-volume, high-precision medical reports efficiently and consistently.
